content.body:
Running upgrade on a legacy install that lacked kb/constraints/ or kb/skills/
dirs caused a write failure: migrateKBLayout only moves existing dirs, so the
subsequent core-constraint/skill write hit ENOENT on .leo/constraints/.

Fix: always ensure memory/, constraints/, skills/ exist in the directory-
creation pass alongside logs/, telemetry/, cache/. Idempotent (MkdirAll).

Reproduced via: legacy .leo/ with only kb/docs/ + config.yaml → leo upgrade
failed with "open .leo/constraints/evidence-over-claim.json: no such file".
After fix: upgrade succeeds, critical user memory in kb/docs/ migrates intact.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
content.subject: fix(upgrade): ensure canonical v0.8 dirs exist before writing core files
